// who I am

About Me

I'm a Computer Science Engineering graduate from Amruta Institute of Engineering and Management Sciences, Bangalore. With a CGPA of 8.4/10, I've built a strong foundation in both theory and practice — from algorithms and databases to full-stack web applications.

I've completed industry-focused training in Full Stack Web Development and am currently advancing my skills in Python Full Stack (Django, REST APIs, cloud deployment) at Pentagon Space, Bengaluru.

I believe in writing code that's not just functional but clean, scalable, and maintainable. Whether it's a secure P2P file transfer system or a responsive travel booking platform, I care about the details.

// what I've built

Projects

Major Project · 2025 – 2026

Gesture-Based Virtual P2P Content Sharing & Control System

A touchless file-sharing system where users control operations — copy, paste, drag-drop — using hand gestures captured through a camera. Transfers happen securely between peers with zero data loss.

Built with TLS/SSL encryption for secure peer-to-peer transfers with optimized throughput.

Achieved 95% gesture recognition accuracy with real-time, low-latency performance.

Python OpenCV MediaPipe TLS/SSL P2P Networking

Mini Project · 2024 – 2025

Travel Management System

A full-stack travel booking platform with secure session-based login, role-based access control, real-time itinerary planning, and an expense tracking dashboard — built on a normalized MySQL schema.

Responsive, mobile-friendly UI with dynamic search, filters, and CRUD operations.

Backend powered by Python + MySQL with optimized database schema design.

HTML5 CSS3 JavaScript Bootstrap Python MySQL
